root_cause_summary: 72% of last-7d spend flowed into creative-director:image; only 65 pins reached Pinterest → ~311 credits per published pin.
2,381 pins rejected in the last 24h vs 1 posted → publish yield ~0.04% at current gate settings.
Native-gate ('score<55+showcase+over_type') is the single largest rejection bucket at 292/7d, followed by duplicate-headline and quality-reset (434 combined).
Zero paid revenue attributed in the 7d window means ROI per credit is currently UNKNOWN — Wave B must populate finance_ai_ledger joins before ROI can be certified.
safe_recommendations_wave_C_only: Pre-filter briefs against native-gate heuristics BEFORE image generation (would eliminate ~292 wasted image gens/7d ≈ 2,336 credits).
De-duplicate headlines at brief stage, not post-render (~229 rejections/7d).
Investigate 'quality-reset-pre-layout-engine' — 205 rejections/7d suggests a layout-engine regression, not creative failure.

compliance.revenue_constitution: ok — no thresholds lowered, no gates bypassed
compliance.conversion_integrity: ok — ROI numbers marked UNKNOWN where join confidence<90
compliance.unified_truth: ok — all numbers sourced from pinterest_credit_events + pinterest_pin_queue + orders (canonical)
